chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2551 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 21.11.2024 Syed Shoukat Ali, advocate for applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Ahmed is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.107/2024 U/s 353, 324, 34 PPC of P.s. Surjani Town, Karachi. 2. As per FIR, on 22.01.2024 a police party of P.S. Surjani Town headed by ASI Sarfraz Ahmed, found five persons ridding on two motorcycles suspicious, hence called them out but they made firing on the police. Police retaliated and succeeded in apprehending applicant and co-accused Abdul Rehman, whereas their three accomplices made their escape good. From co-accused Abdul Rehman allegedly stolen motorcycle involved in Crime No.100/2024 u/s 392, 397 PPC of same police station was recovered. Both the accused have been arraigned in this case u/s 324 PPC. 3. It is admitted that from applicant, no weapon was recovered; hence application of section 324 PPC requires further inquiry. Learned Addl. P.G. has confirmed that there is no other case registered against the applicant, yet she has opposed the bail. The fact that applicant has not been assigned any specific role, no weapon was recovered from him, the case against him requires further inquiry. Hence he is granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
